violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --The walk in freezer condenser has a build up of ice.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Clean the reach in units on the line.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Clean the walk in cooler shelving.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Deep clean the floors, below and behind equipment on the line and under the sink.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. Raw beef patties were stored above raw bacon in the reach in cooler.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. The condenser in the freezer was leaking at the time of inspection and causing ice build up.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The wall behind the 3 compartment sink needs cleaning. The moniters and cameras need to be cleaned. The shelving above the 3 compartment sink needs cleaning.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Sprayer at the 3 compartment sink was leaking at the time of inspection.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not maintained. The hand sink next to the prep area was missing a handle and was not in working order.--Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -The broken hand sink was being used as a dump sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The walk-in floor needs to be cleaned. The walk-in freezer floor needs cleaning and has excessive ice build up.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
